Dec Of Chingchun Chien Iso Application For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-20-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Maria Evangelista; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:17 am and concluding at 9:22 am.

Plaintiff Chingchun Chien is present represented by Steven McLellan, Esq., placed under oath and testifies
Defendant Nelida Arebalo is present in the courtroom.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

The Court addresses the issue of the lack of notice of amount sought in the complaint.

Plaintiff's counsel makes an oral motion to take the matter off calendar and dismiss the motion for default judgment without prejudice for so the complaint can be amended.

The Court GRANTS Plaintiff's oral motion; Motion for default judgment is dismissed without prejudice and the matter is taken off calendar. (D505)
